results.evidence: living-docs-sync.ts:330 passes [...validGroups.keys()] to generateCrossReferences(), not groups.keys()
living-docs-sync.ts:353 allTargetPaths now uses validGroups.keys(); filtered-out projects excluded from cross-ref links
grep -c 'detectMultiProjectMode' living-docs-sync.ts returns 0. ~100 LOC dead method deleted (lines 1182-1288 in original)
Test suite: 102 passed, 10 failed (same 10 pre-existing failures on baseline). Zero regressions from removal.
grep -c 'SKIP_EXTERNAL_SYNC.*toLowerCase' returns 1. Single hoisted const at line ~228.
Both cross-project (line 418) and single-project (line 578) paths reference the hoisted skipExternalSync const. Behavior preserved.
generateLivingDocsImagesEnhanced called at exactly 1 site: line 2174 inside private generateAndInjectImage() helper. Other occurrences are import (65) and JSDoc (2155).
generateAndInjectImage() checks SPECWEAVE_SKIP_IMAGE_GEN==='true' at line 2168, returns content unchanged if set.
TL;DR regex injection at line 2184, same pattern as original. Returns modified content on success.
Static import at line 22: import matter from 'gray-matter'
grep -c "await import('gray-matter')" returns 0. Both dynamic imports replaced with static matter() calls.

findings.title: Displaced JSDoc comment attached to wrong method
findings.issue: The new generateAndInjectImage method was inserted between validateAndRepairConsistency's JSDoc and its method definition, causing the JSDoc to detach from its target.
findings.suggestion: Fixed during grill — JSDoc moved to correct position.
findings.impact: IDE tooltips would show wrong documentation for both methods.
